violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety registered with RIDOH. Application provided New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Various foods on the hot roller were observed held at 121-124 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC elected disposal of product and turned unit up. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Wood is used in the construction of hand sink in the 3-bay area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety certified with RIDOH. Application printed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2024

FOOD hot hold items that is available for CONSUMER shall be prominently labeled with the following information in plain view of the CONSUMER: 1. The common name of the FOOD, or absent a common name, an adequately descriptive identity statement; 2. If made from two or more ingredients, a list of ingredients in descending order of predominance by weight, including a declaration of artificial color or flavor and chemical preservatives, if contained in the FOOD 3.The name of the FOOD source for each MAJOR FOOD ALLERGEN contained in the FOOD unless the FOOD source is already part of the common or usual name of the respective ingredient. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024

Wood is used in the construction of hand sink in the 3-bay area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024
The sanitizer dispenser was observed with a leak when turned on. Leak to be fixed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

The coving/wall behind the counter is in poor repair. The mop holder attached to the wall is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024
